summary: Bobin (Paper Roll) Tracking Module - All tests passed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified working. New module fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Bobin module implementation is complete and follows existing patterns
All endpoints properly protected with JWT auth via Depends(get_current_user)
Stock merge logic works correctly - same brand/width/grammage/color merges into existing
Movement history tracks user_name for audit trail
Delete protection works - cannot delete bobin with stock > 0
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. Existing data: 'Hayat 24cm 17gr Beyaz' with 2 pieces 250kg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bobin module fully tested. All CRUD operations, stock management (purchase, to-machine, sale), movement history, and Excel export working. Auth properly enforced on all endpoints.

details: GET /api/bobins without token returns 401
POST /api/bobins without token returns 401
GET /api/bobins/movements without token returns 401
GET /api/bobins/export without token returns 401
GET /api/bobins - Lists all bobin types
POST /api/bobins - Creates new bobin type with initial stock
POST /api/bobins - Duplicate brand/width/grammage/color merges into existing stock
POST /api/bobins - Validation rejects missing brand or invalid width/grammage
DELETE /api/bobins/{id} - Rejects if stock > 0
DELETE /api/bobins/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/bobins/{id}/purchase - Adds stock correctly
POST /api/bobins/{id}/purchase - Validates quantity and weight > 0
POST /api/bobins/{id}/to-machine - Deducts stock correctly
POST /api/bobins/{id}/to-machine - Rejects insufficient stock
POST /api/bobins/{id}/sale - Deducts stock correctly
POST /api/bobins/{id}/sale - Rejects missing customer_name
GET /api/bobins/movements - Lists all movements with user_name
GET /api/bobins/movements?movement_type=purchase - Filters by type
GET /api/bobins/export - Downloads Excel file with correct content type
Home page shows Bobin button with correct icon and text
/bobin login page renders with username/password fields
Login with depo1/depo123 works - shows main UI
Stock view shows bobin cards with brand, width, grammage, color
Cards show quantity (adet) and weight (kg)
Summary cards show: Bobin Type count, Total Pieces, Total Weight, Movement count
'Yeni Bobin Ekle' dialog opens with all form fields (brand, width, grammage, color, qty, weight, supplier)
'Makineye' dialog opens with machine selection dropdown and quantity input
'Sat' dialog opens with customer name field and quantity input
Stok Ekle button present on bobin cards
'Hareket Gecmisi' tab shows movements with type, bobin label, quantity, weight, user_name, timestamp
Excel export button present in header
